data: Learn how to report task status at work

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to report your task status at work.

Clear updates help your manager track progress and plan the next steps.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/61846263-b498-41bc-90f0-5b80b87304f0-52.-Reporting-Task-Status.jpg
button_text: Cool!

message:
When you want to report your progress at work, use this structure:

"I have completed [task] and I am now moving on to [next step]."

For example: "I have completed the data entry and I am now moving on to the final review."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/61846263-b498-41bc-90f0-5b80b87304f0-52.-Reporting-Task-Status.jpg
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

If you have finished a report and are starting the slides, you can say:

"I have completed the client report and I am now moving on to the presentation slides."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/61846263-b498-41bc-90f0-5b80b87304f0-52.-Reporting-Task-Status.jpg
button_text: Next!

message:
This structure gives your manager a clear picture of where you are.

It shows what is done and what comes next in a simple and professional way.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/61846263-b498-41bc-90f0-5b80b87304f0-52.-Reporting-Task-Status.jpg
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice reporting task status!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to report your task progress to a manager

1.I have completed the data entry and I am now moving on to the final review.
2.I was working on data entry and I think I might finish it by today hopefully.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to update your team leader

1.I am not done yet but I will tell you when I finish the report.
2.I have completed the client report and I am now moving on to the presentation slides.

Correct answer: 2

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. Your manager asks for an update on your work. How do you report your task status?'

'2. Your team leader wants to know how far you are with the project. How do you give an update?'

'3. Your supervisor asks if you have finished your assignment. How do you respond?'

'4. Your colleague asks what you are currently working on. How do you update them?'

'5. Your manager checks in during a meeting. How do you report your progress?'"
